name: Generate AI-powered LinkedIn posts with content strategy and research
description: Takes a topic, researches it with Exa web search, generates a LinkedIn-optimized post with Claude AI including hashtags and hook, and delivers the ready-to-publish content via Gmail and Slack notification.

source.originalName: Generate AI-Powered LinkedIn Posts with Google Gemini and Gen-Imager

exaKey.description: Exa connection key for topic research

gmailKey.description: Gmail connection key for delivering the post

topic.description: Topic for the LinkedIn post (e.g. 'AI in enterprise sales')

recipientEmail.description: Email to send the finished post for review

steps.name: Build Exa research query for LinkedIn topic
Build Claude prompt for LinkedIn post generation
Generate LinkedIn post with Claude AI
Send LinkedIn post draft via Gmail
Build Slack notification for LinkedIn post
Post LinkedIn content notification to Slack
